companyName.zh: 瑞士私人银行业 · 解绑模式

summary.en: An industry archetype of the traditional integrated Swiss private bank, contrasted with two real responses to the same unbundling pressure: Maerki Baumann (Zurich) spun off its transaction platform and now focuses purely on customer relationships, while Pictet (Geneva) chose to remain vertically integrated and manages the three-way trade-off between relationship, product, and infrastructure businesses. Drawn from Hagel & Singer (1999) and Osterwalder's Business Model Generation pattern catalog.
summary.zh: 传统瑞士私人银行的行业 archetype,以及面对同样解绑压力的两种现实选择:Maerki Baumann(苏黎世)剥离了交易平台、现在只专注于客户关系业务;Pictet(日内瓦)选择保持纵向整合、用一家公司谨慎管理客户关系/产品创新/基础设施三种商业活动的内生冲突。内容来自 Hagel & Singer (1999) 与《商业模式新生代》解绑模式案例。

sources.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Unbundling Pattern (pp. 56-63)
Hagel III & Singer · Unbundling the Corporation · HBR 1999
